---
applyTo: "data/courses/**"
---

# Course Publishing Rules

Use these rules when editing `data/courses/**` for the public tutorial site.

- Only publish lessons to the site when the lesson YouTube video is live.
- Do not pre-create future lesson entries with placeholder `videoId` values.
- Do not publish future lesson routes just because a course plan exists in the `courses/` workspace.
- For partially published courses, keep `parts` limited to the currently live lessons only.
- Update lesson titles, durations, and descriptions on the site only when the live lesson metadata is stable enough to treat as public.
- If a course is evolving lesson by lesson, set `totalDuration`, outline copy, and overview content to reflect only the currently live public surface.
- When a new lesson goes live, add it to the site in a separate follow-up change rather than preloading the full planned syllabus.
